summary: Plan mode classification only. #90866 remains the best live canonical for the Discord speculative placeholder and typing-heartbeat parity request. #84276, #87665, and #90017 are related but not true duplicates because each preserves a distinct root cause, channel scope, or implementation question.

actions.reason: Keep #90866 as the canonical Discord parity issue because it covers the broad Discord placeholder and heartbeat feature request and is open/current in the hydrated artifact.
Related Discord typing-controller behavior, but #84276 has a distinct post-delivery cleanup root cause and should not be closed as a duplicate of the broader #90866 feature/parity request.
Related perceived-progress problem in Discord, but #87665 concerns task notification policy for subagent workflows and preserves a different root cause and implementation scope.
#90017 is the Slack-side companion/canonical for the placeholder concept, while #90866 is the Discord parity request. Keep it related rather than folding it into the Discord canonical.
